supports.context: the corner… My general lean for Monday is we resume down to 5400, perhaps 5372-78. Those are both possible pivots to bounce

highlights.text: I provided this short setup to readers back on August 30th (when we closed at 5666), writing: “Bear case Monday: There is no bear case until this flag breaks down at 5585-90.
We sold from this to 5493 last Thursday, then last Friday, took another leg down, I wrote last Thursday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins on the fail of 5493”.
I warned about this on Friday at 4pm writing: “ Obviously a short squeeze is around the corner… My general lean for Monday is we resume down to 5400, perhaps 5372-78.
Those are both possible pivots to bounce us, with 5474-78 being an obvious backtest magnet ”.

post_title: Dead Cat Bounce, Or Bottom in SPX? Sept 10 Plan
